Node 20 is being deprecated. This workflow is running with Node 24 by default. If you need to temporarily use Node 20, you can set the ACTIONS_ALLOW_USE_UNSECURE_NODE_VERSION=true environment variable. For more information see: https://github.blog/changelog/2025-09-19-deprecation-of-node-20-on-github-actions-runners/
Run azure/login@v2
Running Azure CLI Login.
[command]/usr/bin/az cloud set -n azurecloud
Done setting cloud: "azurecloud"

 issuer - https://token.actions.githubusercontent.com
 subject claim - repo:Ar-Sa/SkillOS:environment:dev
 audience - api://AzureADTokenExchange

Attempting Azure CLI login by using OIDC...
Error: AADSTS700213: No matching federated identity record found for presented assertion subject 'repo:Ar-Sa/SkillOS:environment:dev'. Check your federated identity credential Subject, Audience and Issuer against the presented assertion. https://learn.microsoft.com/entra/workload-id/workload-identity-federation Trace ID: 2e3c98a2-7a32-4db4-bf2d-2cdc94961a00 Correlation ID: 831f40af-a471-4117-9f35-ca1840cae435 Timestamp: 2026-07-24 03:11:06Z

Error: Run the command below to authenticate interactively; additional arguments may be added as needed:
az logout
az login

Error: Login failed with Error: The process '/usr/bin/az' failed with exit code 1. Double check if the 'auth-type' is correct. Refer to https://github.com/Azure/login#readme for more information.
